Winamax Poker - Tournament "Sunday Special" buyIn: 20€ + 2€ level: 10 - HandId: #999888-50-5555555555 - Holdem no limit (50/200/400) - 2024/02/10 21:15:00 UTC
Table: 'Sunday Special(999888777)#012' 9-max (real money) Seat #7 is the button
Seat 1: AllinPlayer1 (4500)
Seat 3: HeroName (8200)
Seat 5: AllinPlayer2 (3800)
Seat 7: BigStack (15000)
Seat 9: ShortStack (1200)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
AllinPlayer1 posts ante 50
HeroName posts ante 50
AllinPlayer2 posts ante 50
BigStack posts ante 50
ShortStack posts ante 50
ShortStack posts small blind 200
AllinPlayer1 posts big blind 400
Dealt to HeroName [As Ac]
*** PRE-FLOP ***
HeroName raises 900 to 900
AllinPlayer2 raises 3750 to 3750 and is all-in
BigStack folds
ShortStack calls 950 and is all-in
AllinPlayer1 calls 3350 and is all-in
HeroName calls 2850
*** FLOP *** [Th 7c 2d]
*** TURN *** [Th 7c 2d][5s]
*** RIVER *** [Th 7c 2d 5s][Qh]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
AllinPlayer1 shows [Kh Kd]
HeroName shows [As Ac]
AllinPlayer2 shows [Jh Jd]
ShortStack shows [9s 9c]
HeroName collected 3600 from side pot 2
HeroName collected 1400 from side pot 1
HeroName collected 5050 from main pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 10050 | No Rake
Board: [Th 7c 2d 5s Qh]
Seat 1: AllinPlayer1 (big blind) showed [Kh Kd] and lost
Seat 3: HeroName showed [As Ac] and won 10050
Seat 5: AllinPlayer2 showed [Jh Jd] and lost
